title: From Launch to Legacy: Celebrating the 5th Anniversary of Bin Weevils Rewritten!
author: Scribbles
introHtml: Today marks five years since the launch of Bin Weevils Rewritten, and we’re kicking off the celebrations with FREE GIFTS you know and love! Five Fabulous Mystery Codes are ready for all weevils to enjoy as our birthday festivities begin!
contentHtml:
It’s remarkable to think that five years have passed since Bin Weevils Rewritten first arrived on 26th March 2021! In that time, the Binscape has grown and changed through new features, fresh items, exciting competitions and unforgettable moments! From Celebrity Parties and magazine releases to shopping upgrades and the Bin Weevil Elections, there have been plenty of highlights that have shaped the world we all enjoy.

Thank you for the continued support and enthusiasm you’ve shown throughout this journey! It means a great deal to us. A huge thank you also goes to our wonderful weevils for sticking with us, and to the developers who have spent countless hours expanding and improving Bin Weevils Rewritten for everyone!

Here’s to longevity and many more fun years ahead! We hope you’ll carry on enjoying everything the Binscape has to offer. Slam and Fling are already putting the finishing touches to another grand party to mark this milestone, and it’s set to be something special. I can hear the sound of maracas and party streamers being blown outside the Editors’ Office! Keep an eye out for your invitation very soon!

title: Garden of the Week – March 2026. Wave 1.
author: Garden Inspector
introHtml: Discover the most stunning garden in the Bin and see who’s claimed the deserving runner-up spot! Plus, craft a new Mystery Code to earn fabulous freebies.
contentHtml:
Hello there! It’s time for a new edition of Garden of the Week, brimming with colour, fresh inspiration and important information. Wipe down your wellies, grab a cuppa or whatever you fancy, take a seat and continue reading, as I bring you the latest garden news!

Inspired by Bling’s holiday out in the Wild West, I challenged weevils to create their very own Wild West Gardens, and I have to say I was absolutely blown away by some of the talent on show! The creativity shining through was fabulous! It’s clear weevils were more than ready to turn their gardens into little Western hideouts packed with adventure and excitement. With those new Wild West plants and items arriving at the Garden Shop, gardeners snapped them up straight away, using every last piece to build the perfect setting for this month’s inspections. Even cowgirl Bling was left completely stunned and super proud of what you’ve all put together. I’ve thoroughly enjoyed marking submissions thus far, thank you very much indeed!

So, without further ado, please join me in saying congratulations to Judes our latest Garden of the Week winner! Excellent job. The grand-prize winner earns an exclusive trophy, Bin Badge star and Garden of the Week Backdrop to display in pride. Judes’ full-size garden is now on display inside the Garden Shop!

It’s also time for a runner-up! Khyber. Well done! They’ve earned a golden petal fence, nest poster and Garden of the Week Bin Badge star.

Ready to flex your green fingers? It’s not too late! Get involved to have your garden inspected and win prizes. Find out more here!

Keep those impressively creative ‘Wild West‘ Garden designs coming my way. I can’t wait to see them all weevils! Using the in-game garden camera, send me a photo by 31/03/2026 for a chance of earning a bronze, silver or gold trophy, free gifts and you might be a winner, too!

title: Travel to the Wild West With NEW Nest Items!
author: Scribbles
introHtml: Yee-haw! Get ready to dive into the rugged, sandy deserts of the Wild West! Nestco has just rolled out a loot of NEW items that will help you expand your frontier. Check it out and start building the Wild West territory of your dreams!
contentHtml:
Get ready to embark on an adventure through the rugged, sandy landscapes of the Wild West! Imagine crafting your very own cowboy or cowgirl haven, where you can embrace the spirit of the frontier!

At Nestco, we’re excited to announce that our full set of Wild West items is now available for you to explore! Whether you’re looking to create a cosy homestead or a bustling saloon, there’s something for everyone to expand your Wild West territory.

From classic cowboy gear to charming rustic decor, each item is crafted to bring your imaginative vision to life. So saddle up and get ready to create a vibrant world filled with adventure and excitement, all from the comfort of your own home. The Wild West awaits, and it’s time to make it your own!

Ride the sunset, chase the dawn!

title: Battle of the Bin Winners – Week 173!
author: Ram
introHtml: Take a look at the highest scoring gamers of the week!
contentHtml:
Hey weevils! It’s Ram here, the Bin’s tech whizz. With a variety of fun games available in the Binscape, whether you prefer singleplayer or multiplayer, now is the perfect moment to aim for high scores for a shot at winning Battle of the Bin and earning the title of champion!

Congratulations to our 1st place winner, runnerbeanss! They have received an awesome prize pack that includes 25,000 Mulch, 3,000 XP, 250 Dosh, the Battle of the Bin Crown Hat, and trophy! They’ve also won an animated backdrop to display on their profile with pride! Furthermore, our 2nd place winner, hael, has won 12,500 Mulch, 1,400 XP, 100 Dosh and a Purple Crown Hat!

Our 3rd place winner will also take home 5,000 Mulch, 500 XP, and 40 Dosh. Kudos to all of you, and to everyone who made it onto the leaderboard this week! If you’ve finished between 10th and 4th place, you’ve earned some bonus Dosh!

Note that if a player secures second place for two weeks in a row, they will not be allowed to compete in Battle of the Bin for a period of two weeks. Additionally, to ensure fairness, runnerbeanss will not be able to win the competition for one month.

title: Weekend Multiplier Madness – Now Live!
author: Zing
introHtml: See what Zing has in store for this weekend’s multiplier madness! Take advantage of a fantastic extra BONUS at Flum’s Fountain to rack tons of Mulch and XP this weekend!
contentHtml:
Hi weevils, Zing here! The weekend is here and you know what that means — the Wheel of Multipliers has been spun, and the results are in!

This month is Bin Weevils Rewritten’s 5 year anniversary, so only for each weekend, there’s an exciting x5 Flum’s Fountain XP multiplier in play! It’s a fantastic opportunity to rack up tons of Mulch and XP, helping you level up quickly in anticipation of the new levels ahead! Team up with your buddies to grow these mushrooms and collect more rewards.

Not only is there a 5x Flum’s Fountain multiplier, the wheel landed on a 10x Singleplayer & Multiplayer XP Multiplier!


But hurry — the multiplier ends when the weekend does!

Log in now and feel the power of the spin!

title: Celebrate St. Patrick’s Day With Some LUCKY Magic!
author: Scribbles
introHtml: Happy St. Patrick’s Day! Celebrate with a special FREE freebie code that’s packed with a touch of Irish magic. Enjoy the festivities!
contentHtml:
Happy St. Patrick’s Day, weevils! As we embrace the vibrant greens and the joyful sounds of laughter, it’s time to celebrate this special day filled with culture, tradition, and a touch of magic!

The holiday honours the patron saint of Ireland and is marked by lively parades, the wearing of green clothing, and indulging in delicious Irish food and drinks.

It’s a wonderful occasion for everyone, whether you have Irish heritage or just want to join in the festivities, to come together and enjoy the rich tapestry of Irish culture through music, dance, and community spirit!

Unlock some Irish magic at the Mystery Code Machine by using the celebratory code LUCKOFTHEIRISH for a chance to grab some lucky charm! Wishing you a day filled with joy, warmth, and a sprinkle of good luck! Code expires 17/04/2026.

Sláinte!

title: Introducing your NEW LEVELS & Trophies!
author: Scribbles
introHtml: Dab called on you to design NEW trophies for the NEW levels, and you came through! Check out the player-designed trophies as Levels 86-90 are now ready to be tackled for the very first time in weevil history!
contentHtml:
Hey weevils. Last month, Dab shared that our tech genius, Trigg, was hard at work crafting new trophies and XP goals for you all to achieve!

Dab encouraged you to send in your trophy designs, and you responded with a fantastic selection of creative ideas!

It was tough to choose, but I’m excited to announce that the 5 levels and trophies designed by you are now live! For the first time ever, levels 86-90 are available for you to conquer in the world of weeviling!

Get ready for the big reveal! We’re excited to present your brand-new trophies, shining and ready to celebrate your achievements!

Dive into the fun by playing games, tackling challenges, stamping your Bin Cards, and spinning the Daily Spin. You can also shop for items and join team activities across the Binscape to quickly level up and unlock exciting new trophies for your collection!

But wait, there’s more! We’ve introduced brand new Special Moves that come with the latest level upgrades. Climb to these higher levels, and you’ll earn these impressive Special Moves to show off to your friends!

Level up and set your sights high! What’s your favourite new trophy design? Who will be the first on your Buddy List to hit Level 90?

title: Garden Inspections – March 2026!
author: Garden Inspector
introHtml: Everything you need to know for Garden of the Week this month! Get creative, win trophies and mega Dosh! Who will be the next Garden of the Week winner? Do you have what it takes to claim the title or be a runner-up? Good luck and happy gardening!
contentHtml:
Calling all Super Deluxe garden owners, dynamic decorators, gardening lovers!

I’m thrilled to announce a brand new Garden Inspections theme! The Wild West Garden! Inspired by Bling’s recent trip back from the Wild West, I thought it would be lovely to challenge weevils to create their very own Wild West Garden Paradise. With a history rooted in dusty trails, frontier towns and iconic desert landscapes, this theme is bursting with creative possibilities!

Fill your garden with cactus plants, other perishable plants, and permanent plants (if you wish), along with new decorations and colours like brown, red, gold, yellow, sand, dark blue or even rainbow for luck, plus any other items you choose to bring your Wild West vision to life!

Perhaps you may even be inspired to decorate a Wild West garden for Bling, filled with treasure, sparkly bits and oodles of luxury plants like Bling Mushrooms? Let your imagination run wild as you design the best ever Wild West garden in your own unique style. Incorporate the NEW items on sale now in your garden to impress me and earn a better trophy!

March 2026 Garden Inspections Checklist:

  • Wild West themed Gardens
  • Submit a fully decorated and creative Super Deluxe sized garden design photo
  • Grow a variety of seeds such as permanent plants (optional) however you must choose perishable type and add items (no fixed number)
  • Plants and items (e.g. trees, statues, decorations) working together in a visually pleasing way
  • Garden design must include a balanced amount of plants and garden items

Please be aware that the above requirements must be met in order to receive a trophy, a Cactus Plants Poster Nest Item and the complimentary Dosh gift.

Heaps of Dosh Rewards:

  • Bronze Garden Trophy submissions will earn 50 Dosh.
  • Silver Garden Trophy submissions will earn 100 Dosh.
  • Gold Garden Trophy submissions will earn 200 Dosh.

Garden of the Week Key dates:
Wave 1 winners to be announced on 24 March 2026.
Wave 2 winners are scheduled for announcement on 31 March 2026.

Submission details:
Using the garden camera, send me a photo of a ‘Wild West Garden’ design (in Super Deluxe size) for a chance of earning a trophy and free gifts!
Please take the time to decorate and grow your themed garden design first.
Once your garden is suitably decorated, the green camera (re-log required) will be activated.
It’s essential that you only submit when your garden is fully ready.
I look forward to inspecting your garden weevils. Good luck and happy gardening!
